title: SQL: time zone does not have effect on now()
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id UInt32, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
CREATE TABLE events (event_id UInt32, event_time DateTime NOT NULL, user_id UInt32);
INSERT INTO events (event_id, event_time, user_id) VALUES (1, now(), 1), (2, now(), 2);
SELECT u.name, e.event_time FROM users u JOIN events e ON u.id = e.user_id WHERE e.event_time > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
key_bug_features: now() function ignores time zone settings
